scenarios.name: AI research acceptance
scenarios.objective: Decide whether an AI-generated market-analysis report is ready for client acceptance.
scenarios.claim: The report supports Q2 market-entry planning within stated uncertainty bounds.

scenarios.name: Automation delivery review
scenarios.objective: Evaluate whether an automation handoff has enough evidence for operational acceptance.
scenarios.claim: The automation has mapped outputs, rollback notes, and reviewer-ready acceptance criteria.

scenarios.name: Vendor proof mission
scenarios.objective: Inspect an AI vendor deliverable and turn the decision into an evidence-backed record.
scenarios.claim: The vendor package has supportable claims, surfaced risks, and a reusable decision record.

scenarios.name: Grant milestone verification
scenarios.objective: Assess whether a milestone report deserves acceptance, revision, or escalation.
scenarios.claim: The milestone can be judged through claims, evidence, risk, and receipt state rather than raw narrative.
